data.title: Bitcoin will no longer see 85% crashes, per Cathie Wood, with a new target of $34K set.
data.description: According to the CEO of ARK Invest, Cathie Wood, Bitcoin, being a "proven" asset, will no longer face decreases of 85% or more from its peak values.

data.title: Kura Oncology Reports Inducement Grants Under Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4)
data.description: On April 1, 2026, Kura Oncology, Inc. revealed that the Compensation Committee of the Company’s Board of Directors granted nonstatutory stock options for the purchase of 153,750 shares of common stock to six new employees. This inducement award was approved under the Company’s 2023 Inducement Option Plan. The stock options were granted as a vital inducement for the new employees’ employment, aligning with Nasdaq Listing Rule 5635(c)(4).

data.title: MiNK Therapeutics and Memorial Sloan Kettering to Present Phase II Study of agenT-797 Combination in PD-1 Refractory Gastroesophageal Cancer at AACR 2026
data.description: MiNK Therapeutics, Inc., a company listed on the NASDAQ as INKT, is leading the way in allogeneic invariant natural killer T (allo-iNKT) cell therapies for immune-mediated diseases and cancer treatment. They revealed that data from a Phase II trial conducted at Memorial Sloan Kettering Cancer Center on their agent-797 allo-iNKT cell therapy, combined with botensilimab (BOT) and balstilimab (BAL), will be showcased at the upcoming American Association for Cancer Research (AACR) Annual Meeting in San Diego, CA from April 17-22, 2026. This event is a significant platform for sharing their research progress in this field.

data.title: Figure Technology Solutions Reports Preliminary March & Q1 2026 Operating Data
data.description: Figure Technology Solutions, a prominent blockchain-native capital marketplace, announced key preliminary operating data for the month and quarter concluding on March 31, 2026. The company, traded under Nasdaq as FIGR and OPEN as FGRS, serves as a major player in the origination, funding, sale, and trading of tokenized assets. This latest update offers valuable insights into the company's recent performance.

data.title: XCharge North America and JOJO Superfast EV Charging Launch New Midwest EV Charging Infrastructure
data.description: XCharge North America ("XCharge NA"), a subsidiary of XCHG Limited (Nasdaq: XCH), has partnered with JOJO Superfast EV Charging to establish a high-power electric vehicle charging network in Illinois. The collaboration aims to strengthen the North American electrical grid. XCharge NA, known for providing high-power EV charging and battery-integrated solutions, will manage the entire process from designing to implementing the charging sites. This partnership signifies a significant step towards expanding the EV infrastructure in Illinois.

data.title: Algorand spikes by double digits after being mentioned in Google paper on post-quantum protocols, as crypto narrative shifts.
data.description: The value of Algorand experienced a significant increase after being referenced in a research paper by Google. This surge is attributed to the growing interest in post-quantum cryptography within the cryptocurrency sector.

data.title: Stündenglass x Be$os Partnership Signals New Era of Latino Culture-Driven Cannabis Branding
data.description: In Los Angeles, a collaboration between Be$os, a Latino-focused cannabis lifestyle brand, and Stündenglass, a top player in gravity-powered infusion technology, has resulted in the launch of a special Talavera-inspired gravity infuser. This partnership signifies one of Stündenglass’ initial ventures with a Latino-oriented brand and represents a pivotal moment for Be$os, established in the summer of 2025, offering a range of all-in-one products and pre-rolls. Beyond a mere product release, this collaboration signifies a significant milestone for both companies.

data.title: Tempo Blockchain's launch on Dune Analytics offers detailed analysis of its stablecoin-based payment system with sub-second finality.
data.description: Tempo blockchain, supported by Stripe, is now accessible on Dune, offering a comprehensive examination of its stablecoin-centric payment framework with sub-second confirmation times. Explore further for detailed insights.

data.title: Price Hikes Driving U.S. Streaming Video Sales Growth, Not New Subscribers
data.description: Subscription streaming video platforms like Netflix are focusing on implementing price hikes and introducing ads in order to boost revenue growth. This shift in strategy has resulted in an increase in sales within the U.S., with a noticeable impact on revenue generation rather than solely relying on acquiring new subscribers. The move highlights a pivot towards alternative sources of revenue for these services in order to sustain growth and profitability.

data.title: Building Relationships With These Tips Can Turbocharge Your Career
data.description: Establishing strong relationships is crucial for advancing in your career and securing desirable employment opportunities. Connecting with others is essential for climbing the corporate hierarchy and achieving your career goals. By following these tips on building relationships, you can significantly enhance your professional growth.
